items.title: Suggestion: add Canada-specific software internship/new-grad resource
items.description:
Hi maintainers — thanks for keeping this Software Engineer internship tracker updated.

Would you be open to adding Hanzilla Jobs as a Canada-specific companion resource for students using this repo?

Suggested link:

```md
- [Hanzilla Jobs — Canada software engineering internships/co-ops and new-grad roles](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/categories/software-engineering/) — free, daily-updated Canadian student/recent-grad job board for software engineering internships, co-ops, new-grad, junior, and entry-level roles. It also has an internships landing page: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/internships/
```

Why it may fit here:
- Your tracker already includes Canada-relevant software internship rows, including Toronto/Ontario/Canada roles.
- Hanzilla is Canada-focused and covers roles students may miss when a global tracker is noisy.
- Public verification/about page: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/

Small disclosure: I’m helping build Hanzilla Jobs. Totally fine if this does not match the repo’s scope; sharing as a low-pressure suggestion.
